description:
As a user
  I want to manage my todo items
  So that I can organize my tasks

elements.name: Add single todo item

steps.name: I navigate to the TodoMVC application
I add a todo with text "Buy groceries"
I should see the todo "Buy groceries" in the list
I should see "1 item left" text

elements.name: Add multiple todo items

steps.name: I navigate to the TodoMVC application
I add a todo with text "Task 1"
I add a todo with text "Task 2"
I add a todo with text "Task 3"
I should see the todo "Task 1" in the list
I should see the todo "Task 2" in the list
I should see the todo "Task 3" in the list
I should see "3 items left" text

elements.name: Mark todo as completed

steps.name: I navigate to the TodoMVC application
I add a todo with text "Complete task"
I mark the todo "Complete task" as completed
the todo "Complete task" should be marked as completed
I should see "0 items left" text

elements.name: Filter Active todos

steps.name: I navigate to the TodoMVC application
I add a todo with text "Active task"
I add a todo with text "Completed task"
I mark the todo "Completed task" as completed
I filter todos by "Active"
I should see the todo "Active task" in the list
I should not see the todo "Completed task" in the list

elements.name: Filter Completed todos

steps.name: I navigate to the TodoMVC application
I add a todo with text "Active task"
I add a todo with text "Completed task"
I mark the todo "Completed task" as completed
I filter todos by "Completed"
I should see the todo "Completed task" in the list
I should not see the todo "Active task" in the list

elements.name: View All todos

steps.name: I navigate to the TodoMVC application
I add a todo with text "Task 1"
I add a todo with text "Task 2"
I mark the todo "Task 1" as completed
I filter todos by "Active"
I filter todos by "All"
I should see the todo "Task 1" in the list
I should see the todo "Task 2" in the list

elements.name: Delete single todo item

steps.name: I navigate to the TodoMVC application
I add a todo with text "Delete me"
I delete the todo "Delete me"
I should not see the todo "Delete me" in the list

elements.name: Delete all completed todos with Clear Completed button

steps.name: I navigate to the TodoMVC application
I add a todo with text "Task 1"
I add a todo with text "Task 2"
I mark the todo "Task 1" as completed
I mark the todo "Task 2" as completed
I click the "Clear completed" button
I should not see the todo "Task 1" in the list
I should not see the todo "Task 2" in the list

elements.name: Toggle completed status multiple times

steps.name: I navigate to the TodoMVC application
I add a todo with text "Toggle task"
I mark the todo "Toggle task" as completed
I should see "0 items left" text
I mark the todo "Toggle task" as uncompleted
I should see "1 item left" text

elements.name: Item counter decreases when marking complete

steps.name: I navigate to the TodoMVC application
I add a todo with text "Task 1"
I add a todo with text "Task 2"
I should see "2 items left" text
I mark the todo "Task 1" as completed
I should see "1 item left" text

elements.name: Empty todo item should not be added

steps.name: I navigate to the TodoMVC application
I press Enter on empty todo input
the todo list should be empty

elements.name: Whitespace-only todo should not be added

steps.name: I navigate to the TodoMVC application
I add a todo with text "   "
the todo list should be empty

elements.name: Cannot mark non-existent todo as complete

steps.name: I navigate to the TodoMVC application
there should be no todos in the list

elements.name: Clear Completed button should not appear when no todos are completed

steps.name: I navigate to the TodoMVC application
I add a todo with text "Active task"
the "Clear completed" button should not be visible

elements.name: Delete button should not be visible when not hovering

steps.name: I navigate to the TodoMVC application
I add a todo with text "Task to delete"
the delete button for "Task to delete" should not be visible

elements.name: Completed filter should show no items when all are active

steps.name: I navigate to the TodoMVC application
I add a todo with text "Active task"
I filter todos by "Completed"
the todo list should be empty

elements.name: Active filter should show no items when all are completed

steps.name: I navigate to the TodoMVC application
I add a todo with text "Task"
I mark the todo "Task" as completed
I filter todos by "Active"
the todo list should be empty

elements.name: No item counter should show when no todos exist

steps.name: I navigate to the TodoMVC application
the "items left" counter should not be visible

elements.name: Deleting all items should show empty state

steps.name: I navigate to the TodoMVC application
I add a todo with text "Delete this"
I delete the todo "Delete this"
the todo list should be empty

elements.name: Special characters should be handled correctly

steps.name: I navigate to the TodoMVC application
I add a todo with text "<script>alert('xss')</script>"
I should see the todo "<script>alert('xss')</script>" in the list

elements.name: Duplicate todos should both be added

steps.name: I navigate to the TodoMVC application
I add a todo with text "Duplicate task"
I add a todo with text "Duplicate task"
I should see "2" todos with text "Duplicate task"
I should see "2 items left" text

name: TodoMVC Application - Complete Test Suite
